summary: Frontend testing of Facebook-style sidebar and create post widget features. All 9 requested features verified working correctly. Three-column layout displays properly on desktop with LeftSidebar (lg:1024px+), main feed (center), and RightSidebar (xl:1280px+). CreatePostWidget shows 'What's on your mind' with Live video, Photo/video, Feeling/activity buttons. Sidebars correctly hidden on mobile view with bottom navigation visible.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'
Multiple 422 validation errors in console during page load

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'What's on your mind', 'Live video', 'Photo/video', or 'Feeling/activity' navigates to /post/create which shows blank page - route not matched

passed_tests: Left sidebar visible on desktop (lg breakpoint 1024px+) with class 'hidden lg:block'
Left sidebar contains user profile button at top
Left sidebar contains Friends, Memories, Saved, Reels navigation items
Left sidebar 'See more' button expands to show Events, Marketplace, Gaming, News
Left sidebar has 'Your shortcuts' section with FaceConnect Premium and Face Scanner
Left sidebar has footer with 'FaceConnect © 2024'
Right sidebar visible on desktop (xl breakpoint 1280px+) with class 'hidden xl:block'
Right sidebar shows 'Sponsored' section with 'Upgrade to Premium'
Right sidebar shows 'People you may know' section with 'See all' link
CreatePostWidget displays 'What's on your mind, {username}?' input
CreatePostWidget shows 'Live video' button with red video icon
CreatePostWidget shows 'Photo/video' button with green image icon
CreatePostWidget shows 'Feeling/activity' button with yellow smile icon
Three-column layout on desktop with LeftSidebar, main feed, RightSidebar
Left sidebar hidden on mobile (390px viewport)
Right sidebar hidden on mobile (390px viewport)
Bottom navigation visible on mobile
Posts feed loads with Like, Comment, Share buttons (12 Like, 11 Comment, 10 Share)
Stories bar visible with 'Your story' option
Main navigation (Home, Explore, Reels, Messages, Create) working
Navigation to /explore works correctly
Navigation to /chat (Messages) works correctly
action_items: Add /post/create route to handle create post navigation from CreatePostWidget buttons
critical_code_review_comments: FacebookSidebar.jsx: Well-structured LeftSidebar (w-[280px], sticky, hidden lg:block) and RightSidebar (w-[320px], hidden xl:block) components
CreatePostWidget.jsx: Clean implementation with user avatar, 'What's on your mind' prompt, and three quick action buttons (Live video, Photo/video, Feeling/activity)
Home.jsx: Three-column layout properly implemented with flex container, LeftSidebar on left, main feed in center (max-w-[680px]), RightSidebar on right
CreatePostWidget navigates to /post/create but this route doesn't exist - causes blank page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Facebook-style sidebars verified working: LeftSidebar (hidden lg:block w-[280px]) shows at 1024px+, RightSidebar (hidden xl:block w-[320px]) shows at 1280px+. CreatePostWidget buttons navigate to /post/create which is not routed - shows blank page. WebSocket and 422 errors are known non-blocking issues from previous iterations.

CreatePostWidget.tested: 'What's on your mind' prompt + Live video, Photo/video, Feeling/activity buttons all present
CreatePostWidget.issue: /post/create route not defined - blank page on click

MobileResponsiveness.tested: Sidebars hidden at 390px, bottom nav visible, feed displays correctly
